query:
SELECT 
  oi.id, 
  oi.productId,
  p.name as productName,
  pi.imageUrl
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON p.id = pi.productId
WHERE oi.orderId = 510001
LIMIT 10;
